title: RR Army Hospital Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026, Free Application Form & Apply Now -
short_info: RR Army Hospital Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026: Virus Research and Diagnostic Laboratory (VRDL), Army Hospital R&R, Delhi Cantt has issued a notification for the position of Laboratory Technician. The recruitment drive comprises one vacancy. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 31-05-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the RR Army Hospital Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026 is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Laboratory Technician 12th Science with a DMLT Diploma with Exp orB.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology (MLT), Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Life Sciences.

how_to_apply: Make your Latest Bio Data. Scan your written application and all educational certificates into a single PDF file. Open your email account and click on Compose to start a new message. Enter vrdlahrrdelhi@gmail.com in the “To” field. Set the subject line as: “Application for the Post of ………………….”. Attach your scanned PDF document and click Send.
